TITLE: Input source & character cursor
DESC: Position-tracked peek/advance over string or stream (src/source.lisp). Prerequisite for all reading.

TITLE: Condition taxonomy & loud-failure contract
DESC: yaml-error hierarchy; every failure signals with position, never a sentinel (src/conditions.lisp).

TITLE: Conformance harness + vendored test-suite
DESC: Vendor yaml-test-suite (351 cases); Parachute runner loads each case, compares events/JSON, honors the fail flag, maintains a known-failing list.

TITLE: Indentation & whitespace engine
DESC: Column tracking, indentation context stack, line-fold primitives. Tags: whitespace(60), indent(31).

TITLE: Plain scalars + core-schema resolution
DESC: resolve-scalar: null->CL:NULL, false->NIL, true->T, int, float, else string. Tags: scalar(88), simple, empty.

TITLE: Comment handling
DESC: Strip '#' comments between tokens and lines. Tag: comment(39).

TITLE: Document framing: --- / ... / streams
DESC: Document start/end markers and multi-document streams. Tags: header(23), footer(13), document.

TITLE: Block sequences
DESC: '- item' block sequences -> vectors. Tag: sequence(82).

TITLE: Block mappings
DESC: 'key: value' block mappings -> hash-tables (test equal). Tag: mapping(123).

TITLE: Single- & double-quoted scalars
DESC: Quoting and escape handling. Tags: double(32), single(9).

TITLE: Directives %YAML / %TAG
DESC: %YAML version and %TAG handle declarations. Tag: directive(20).

TITLE: Literal & folded block scalars
DESC: '|' literal and '>' folded with indentation indicators and chomping. Tags: literal(33), folded(29).

TITLE: Flow sequences & mappings
DESC: Inline [..] and {..} collections plus flow scalars. Tag: flow(75).

TITLE: Explicit keys (?)
DESC: '?'-marked mapping keys. Tag: explicit-key(22).

TITLE: Complex & empty keys
DESC: Non-scalar keys and empty/absent keys. Tags: complex-key(8), empty-key(9).

TITLE: Anchors (&)
DESC: Anchor any node; record in the anchor table. Tag: anchor(25).

TITLE: Tags: !!type / !local / unknown
DESC: Explicit, local, and unknown tag resolution. Tags: tag(40), local-tag(8), unknown-tag(10).

TITLE: Aliases (*)
DESC: '*ref' resolved by shared identity; undefined alias -> yaml-reference-error. Tag: alias(18).

TITLE: Merge keys (<<)
DESC: '<<:' merges an aliased mapping into the current mapping.

TITLE: Duplicate-key detection
DESC: Duplicate mapping key signals an error (loud, no last-wins). Tag: duplicate-key(1).

TITLE: Comprehensive invalid-input errors
DESC: All invalid-input cases signal the correct condition with position. Tags: error(74), libyaml-err(4).

TITLE: YAML 1.3 divergence handling
DESC: 1.3-err / 1.3-mod / upto-1.2 version-dependent behavior. Tags: 1.3-err(30), 1.3-mod(22), upto-1.2(12).

TITLE: Edge / boundary cases
DESC: Boundary conditions. Tag: edge(7).

TITLE: Full spec-example conformance
DESC: All official spec examples green. Tag: spec(114). Capstone of the parser.

TITLE: Emitter + round-trip
DESC: Native value -> YAML; parse->emit->parse structural identity. Secondary deliverable.
